detectors.description:
Reentrancy in GreenToken.openTrading() (GreenToken.sol#575-601):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (GreenToken.sol#585)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (GreenToken.sol#587)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (GreenToken.sol#587)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (GreenToken.sol#597)
	GreenToken.tradingOpen (GreenToken.sol#283) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- GreenToken.openTrading() (GreenToken.sol#575-601)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in GreenToken._transfer(address,address,uint256) (GreenToken.sol#441-505):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (GreenToken.sol#487)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (GreenToken.sol#519-531)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (GreenToken.sol#493)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (GreenToken.sol#569)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (GreenToken.sol#503)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (GreenToken.sol#657)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (GreenToken.sol#637)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (GreenToken.sol#639)
	GreenToken._rOwned (GreenToken.sol#241) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- GreenToken._takeTeam(uint256) (GreenToken.sol#651-659)
	- GreenToken._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (GreenToken.sol#633-647)
	- GreenToken.balanceOf(address) (GreenToken.sol#359-363)
	- GreenToken.constructor() (GreenToken.sol#309-323)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (GreenToken.sol#503)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (GreenToken.sol#665)
	GreenToken._rTotal (GreenToken.sol#257) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- GreenToken._getCurrentSupply() (GreenToken.sol#757-767)
	- GreenToken._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (GreenToken.sol#663-669)
	- GreenToken.constructor() (GreenToken.sol#309-323)
	- GreenToken.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (GreenToken.sol#415-423)
